flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Houghton University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($16.4k → $18.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Houghton University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($16.4k → $18.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Houghton University fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (841 → 753).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Houghton University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).
